  7. コンストラクタの詳細
    1. SimulatorSnapshot(double, double, double, Map, double, CharacterId, CombatSimulator.Moonsign, Map, boolean, double, Map, Map, List, List, List, List)

クラス SimulatorSnapshot

java.lang.Object
simulation.SimulatorSnapshot
public class SimulatorSnapshot extends Object
Immutable capture of all mutable CombatSimulator state at a point in time.

Produced by CombatSimulator.saveSnapshot() and consumed by CombatSimulator.restoreSnapshot(SimulatorSnapshot). The snapshot stores references to existing Buff objects (not copies); restoration resets their timing fields in-place and rebuilds the buff lists to exactly the saved membership.

The event queue (SimulationClock timer events) is intentionally excluded. Pending events (e.g. Flins burst delayed hits) are anonymous inner classes that capture local variables and cannot be serialised. The resulting estimation bias approximately cancels in the VinePPO Q_MC - V_MC advantage difference.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • SimulatorSnapshot

      public SimulatorSnapshot(double currentTime, double rotationTime, double totalDamage, Map<String,Double> damageBySource, double lastSwapTime, CharacterId activeCharacterId, CombatSimulator.Moonsign moonsign, Map<String,double[]> icdStates, boolean ecTimerRunning, double thundercloudEndTime, Map<Element,Double> enemyAura, Map<CharacterId, SimulatorSnapshot.CharacterSnapshot> characters, List<Buff> teamBuffRefs, List<double[]> teamBuffTimes, List<Buff> fieldBuffRefs, List<double[]> fieldBuffTimes)
      Constructs a simulator snapshot.
      パラメータ:
      currentTime - simulation clock time
      rotationTime - rotation time
      totalDamage - accumulated total damage
      damageBySource - per-source damage map
      lastSwapTime - last swap time
      activeCharacterId - currently active character id
      moonsign - current moonsign state
      icdStates - ICD group states
      ecTimerRunning - EC timer flag
      thundercloudEndTime - thundercloud expiry time
      enemyAura - enemy aura gauge map
      characters - per-character snapshots
      teamBuffRefs - team buff object references
      teamBuffTimes - team buff timing pairs [startTime, expirationTime]
      fieldBuffRefs - field buff object references
      fieldBuffTimes - field buff timing pairs [startTime, expirationTime]
